name: Playboys, Ventures, Pulaski Park, Rice Boys
description: Austin neighborhood Established 1971-mid-1980s Sections of Austin Division & Waller Established 1971 as Playboys (headquarters PVR) Menard & Thomas Established as Rice Boys (PVR) Central Ave & Division (Austin Bowl headquarters, PVP) Crystal to Rice, Long to Pine Established as Rice Boys
